summary: Verified service worker v5 SPA app-shell pattern and bcrypt auth hardening for management login flows. All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly.

issues: Cookie consent banner persists at bottom - may want to auto-dismiss or style it better

The service worker now serves cached /index.html for navigation requests when offline instead of offline.html, enabling proper SPA routing for PWA desktop apps.
